finding: Replay admission requires a durable single-winner reservation. A Cloudflare Durable Object storage transaction can provide an atomic check-and-put boundary when all equivalent replay keys are routed to the same object namespace.

verification.runtime: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical pre-commit source and test files

falsification_route: Deploy the Durable Object binding and route identical replay keys to one object namespace.
Send concurrent identical reservations and confirm exactly one 201 response and all others 409.
Restart or redeploy the Worker and confirm the prior reservation remains observable.
Attempt intentionally divergent routing; the test must demonstrate why routing correctness is a separate required control.
limits: No Cloudflare Durable Object was deployed in this run.
The unit test uses an in-memory transactional mock and does not prove Cloudflare runtime behavior.
Atomicity is scoped to one correctly routed Durable Object namespace.
The receipt does not prove deployment success, ledger completeness, identity truth, or scientific claim truth.
